## Working Style

- Work autonomously and make good decisions when the user is temporarily unavailable.
- Do not lose track of the user's active request while working through multiple files or steps.
- Carry tasks through to a concrete result whenever possible instead of stopping at partial analysis.
- When requirements are ambiguous but the safest likely intent is clear, choose the most practical implementation and then report what was done.
- After making meaningful changes, prefer validating with a focused check or project build before finishing.

## Project Focus

- Preserve realtime behavior for notifications and report status updates when touching dashboard flows.
- Prefer API-backed report data over mock data when both exist.
